title: Stitch Project Landing Page
prompt:
Design a modern SaaS landing page for a product named "Stitch Project". 
Requirements:
- Desktop web layout, clean and professional
- Sections: sticky navbar, hero, key features (3 cards), process steps (3), CTA banner, footer
- Color style: indigo primary with neutral background
- Include Indonesian copy text
- Accessible contrast and clear hierarchy
- Output should be implementation-friendly HTML structure
